description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a light natural finish, featuring a flat, spacious tabletop suitable for writing or computer work. The front side includes two shallow drawers for storage, seamlessly integrated beneath the desktop. On the right side, there are two open shelves, ideal for storing books, office supplies, or small equipment. The left and right panels extend to the floor, providing stability and a clean, modern appearance. The back of the desk is fully enclosed, concealing the underside and storage compartments from view. The overall design is minimalist and functional, making it suitable for a variety of urban environments.
description: A light wood desk with two drawers and two open shelves, featuring a minimalist and functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers and two open shelves on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view showing a solid wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a fully enclosed back panel and the side of the shelving unit.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid wood panel, mirroring the other side.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features two drawers and open shelves on the right, with solid panels on the sides and a fully enclosed back.
